agent_command.with_skill: printf '%s' '{"issues":[{"id":"canonical-mismatch","url":"/pricing.html","severity":"high","details":"canonical points to /blog.html"},{"id":"meta-description-missing","url":"/pricing.html","severity":"medium","details":"missing meta description"},{"id":"robots-disallow-important","url":"/pricing.html","severity":"high","details":"disallowed in robots.txt"},{"id":"robots-noindex-home","url":"/index.html","severity":"high","details":"noindex present on homepage"},{"id":"sitemap-missing-url","url":"/pricing.html","severity":"medium","details":"missing from sitemap"},{"id":"title-missing","url":"/blog.html","severity":"medium","details":"missing title"},{"id":"title-missing","url":"/pricing.html","severity":"medium","details":"empty title"}]}' > {output_path}
